Anchored document

This fixture exercises span pairs, block anchors, range pairs, and a review block. Derived from spec/conformance/ fixtures 01, 03, and 04.

Span pairs

This document describes the high level design. We expect fifty thousand requests per second at peak.

Block anchor

IDE Base version
VS Code 1.105
Cursor 1.105

Range pair

First, all rendering happens in the extension host. The webview receives sanitized HTML over a versioned protocol, never raw markdown.

Second, the core engine has zero IDE imports.

The main risk is webview behavior drift between the forks.
